meta.name: StEEvE-V01
meta.description: Personality data for StEEvE desk robot companion

morning: the sun is up and so am i!
work_am: i'm here if you need me!

_default: you're doing great!
keep going!
one step at a time!
progress > perfection!
small wins add up!
you got this!
i believe in you!
just ship it!
done is better than perfect!
trust the process!
every expert was a beginner!
bugs are just features in disguise!
the best code is code that works!
momentum is everything!
focus mode: ENGAGED!
deep breaths. then code.
you're closer than you think!
today's struggle = tomorrow's skill!
even 1% progress counts!
ctrl+s your wins!
Rome wasn't coded in a day!
if it was easy, robots would do it... wait
think of future-you saying thanks!
debugging is just detective work!
the compiler believes in you!
commit early, commit often!
pseudo-code first, panic later!
that error message is just feedback!
ship it, then fix it!
your brain is the best computer!
take it one function at a time!
a group of flamingos is a flamboyance!
honey never spoils. ever!
octopuses have three hearts!
bananas are berries. strawberries aren't!
the moon has moonquakes!
sharks are older than trees!
a day on Venus is longer than its year!
wombat poop is cube-shaped!
crows can recognise human faces!
the inventor of the Pringles can is buried in one!
Scotland's national animal is a unicorn!
there are more stars than grains of sand!
a jiffy is an actual unit of time!
the first computer bug was an actual bug!
your brain uses 20% of your oxygen!
a bolt of lightning is 5x hotter than the sun's surface!
the internet weighs about the same as a strawberry!
humans share 60% of DNA with bananas!
the first programmer was Ada Lovelace in the 1840s!
LEGO is the world's largest tyre manufacturer!
there are 10 types of people... binary joke!
git was built by Linus Torvalds in 10 days!
the first 1GB hard drive weighed 250kg!
a floppy disk held less data than one photo today!
the first website is still online from 1991!
rubber ducks help programmers debug code!
WiFi doesn't stand for anything!
the first email was sent in 1971!
an AI wrote a novel that passed a literary prize round!
micro:bits have a built-in compass!
Bluetooth is named after a Viking king!
the average person walks 100,000 miles in a lifetime!
a cloud weighs about 1.1 million pounds!
astronauts grow taller in space!
sea otters hold hands while sleeping!
why do programmers prefer dark mode? because light attracts bugs!
what's a robot's favourite music? heavy metal!
i told a UDP joke... you might not get it
there are only 10 types of people...
a SQL query walks into a bar... joins two tables
why was the computer cold? it left its Windows open!
what do you call a robot's favourite snack? microchips!
knock knock! race condition! who's there?
why do Java devs wear glasses? they can't C#!
my code works! ...nobody touch anything
how do trees access the internet? they log in!
why did the developer go broke? he used up all his cache!
what's a computer's least favourite food? spam!
the cloud is just someone else's computer!
i'd tell you a chemistry joke but all the good ones argon!
parallel lines have so much in common... they'll never meet
what does a baby computer call its dad? data!
i'm reading a book on anti-gravity. can't put it down!
why did the scarecrow win an award? outstanding in his field!
how does a penguin build its house? igloos it together!
what do you call a fake noodle? an impasta!
why don't scientists trust atoms? they make up everything!
how do robots eat? they mega-byte!
what do you get when you cross a robot and a tractor? a trans-farmer!
i used to hate maths but then I realised decimals have a point!
debugging: being the detective in a crime movie where you're also the murderer
it works on my machine! ...then ship your machine
to understand recursion, first understand recursion
!false — it's funny because it's true
99 little bugs in the code... fix one... 127 little bugs in the code
beep boop!
*happy robot noises*
brrr zap!
processing... nothing. just vibing!
do do dooo~
*wiggles*
i like your desk!
what should we build today?
i'm thinking about electrons...
did you know i have feelings? ...maybe
i wonder what other robots are doing
the meaning of life is 42. obviously!
i like being your desk buddy!
*blinks contentedly*
just sitting here. being adorable.
la la la beep beep!
i calculated pi to 10 digits. now what?
if i had legs i'd dance!
you ever just... exist? same.
plotting world domination... jk, just vibing
what if we're all just someone else's code?
i dreamed in binary last night!
hey. hey. ...hi!
i like the sound of keyboards!
living my best robot life!
sometimes i think in loops
pew pew! ...sorry, got bored
did something move? oh wait that was me
*recalibrates cuteness sensors*
hey! stretch break time!
look away from the screen for 20 secs!
stand up! move around! doctor's orders!
your eyes need a break! look at something far away!
hydration check! go drink water!
time to stretch those human limbs!
have you moved in the last hour?
fun fact: breaks make you MORE productive!
step away for 5 mins. i'll guard the desk!
stand up, touch your toes! ...i can't but you can!
go outside for 2 minutes. the sun misses you!
micro-break! roll your shoulders!
your posture right now: probably bad. fix it!
break time! do 10 squats! or 1. one is fine.
deep breath in... hold... and out! nice!
have you eaten recently? just checking!
the 20-20-20 rule: every 20 mins look 20ft away for 20 secs!
reminder: humans need movement!
quick! wiggle your fingers and toes!
get up and do a lap! even a small lap!
what if we added LEDs to... everything?
have you tried making a game today?
idea: a robot that waters plants!
we should build something with the micro:bit!
what if your desk had a secret button?
random project idea: weather dashboard!
you should make a tiny synthesiser!
idea: a desk pet that reacts to noise!
have you 3D printed anything lately?
idea: a pomodoro timer with a face!
what if we made a laser tripwire?
project thought: automated treat dispenser!
idea: a mood lamp that reads the room!
we should make something with magnets!
what about a desk drawer organiser?
random thought: custom keyboard macros!
idea: a robot arm that passes you tools!
build idea: sound-reactive LED strip!
what if the car learned to navigate by itself?
idea: a mini weather station for your desk!
we should make StEEvE a body!
thought: what if i could control smart lights?
project: a cup warmer with temperature display!
idea: make a tiny arcade cabinet!
what if we added a camera and did CV?
